race.description: Mcdonalds Tamworth Country Boosted Mdn Hcp
race.comment: Fleet-footed filly HARAS (3) started $1.80 and looked home after leading but found one better near the line over this distance at Moree last start. Rock hard fit after two runs back and should keep going today to crack the maiden status. IDOL BYE (7) had a 38-day let-up before her modest effort at Moree recently. Has only raced twice and will be better for that last run so she can improve. ORDINARY ANGEL (2) did a much better job last start when lining up for the second time, closing hard to get up for second over 1250m at Gunnedah. Draws a nice gate and looks sure to be about the money again. First starter BEMBOKA LASS (4) went well in a recent trial here. Draws the fence so should get all the favours. INSATIABLE (1) found 900m at Scone too slick on debut a fortnight ago. Can improve out to this trip.
